abort.zha_not_configured: Configure ZHA first, then add EasyIR.

error.unknown_ieee: Could not read Zigbee IEEE from this device. Pick another ZHA device.
error.invalid_profile: Pick a built-in profile or enter a valid custom file path.

user.title: EasyIR
user.description: Pick your ZHA IR device (picker prefers TS1201 models). Built-in profiles ship with EasyIR; custom path is optional.%optional_supported

data.profile_path: Custom profile path (only if you chose Custom path)

start_learn.name: Start IR learn mode
start_learn.description: Enable learn mode for a configured IR hub and keep it active for the timeout window.

ieee.name: IEEE
ieee.description: Optional if default IEEE is set in the integration entry.

timeout_seconds.name: Timeout (seconds)
timeout_seconds.description: Auto-stop learn mode after timeout, if supported by the hub.

get_last_learned.name: Get last learned IR code
get_last_learned.description: Read the last learned IR payload from the hub.

ieee.name: IEEE
ieee.description: Optional if default IEEE is set in the integration entry.

encoding_hint.name: Encoding hint
encoding_hint.description: Optional payload decode hint (for example: auto, tuya_base64, broadlink_base64, tuya_learn_base64).

stop_learn.name: Stop IR learn mode
stop_learn.description: Disable learn mode for a configured IR hub.

ieee.name: IEEE
ieee.description: Optional if default IEEE is set in the integration entry.
